tasks.label: wisp:start-emulator
tasks.command: if adb devices | awk '/^emulator-/{found=1} END{exit !found}'; then echo "Emulator already running"; else nohup "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/emulator/emulator" -avd Pixel_9_API_35 >/tmp/wisp-emulator.log 2>&1 & echo "Starting emulator Pixel_9_API_35"; fi

tasks.label: wisp:wait-for-boot
tasks.command: adb wait-for-device; echo "Waiting for Android boot (Package Manager)..."; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 180 ]; do b=$(adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | xargs); if [ "$b" = "1" ]; then echo "Boot complete."; exit 0; fi; i=$((i+1)); sleep 2; done; echo "Timeout: emulator did not finish booting."; exit 1

tasks.label: wisp:prepare-device-space
tasks.command: adb uninstall com.wisp.app >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; adb shell pm trim-caches 2G >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

tasks.label: wisp:install-debug
tasks.command: export JAVA_HOME="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home"; export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug && SERIAL=$(adb devices | awk '/^emulator-.*[[:space:]]+device$/{print $1; exit}'); [ -n "$SERIAL" ] || SERIAL=$(adb devices | awk '/^[[:alnum:]:.-]+[[:space:]]+device$/{print $1; exit}'); [ -n "$SERIAL" ] || { echo "No adb device in state device"; exit 1; }; adb -s "$SERIAL" install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk

tasks.label: wisp:launch-app
tasks.command: adb wait-for-device && adb shell monkey -p com.wisp.app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: wisp:logcat
tasks.command: if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then adb logcat | rg --line-buffered "AndroidRuntime|FATAL EXCEPTION|System.err|wisp|Wisp"; else adb logcat; fi
